copilot.askAboutReviewItem: ProForge flagged this as {{severity}}: "{{description}}". Can you explain the concern and suggest a concrete fix?
copilot.changeApplied: Change applied — press Ctrl+Z to undo.
copilot.changeApplyFailed: Could not apply — the text may have changed.
copilot.diagnosticFailed: I couldn't run the diagnostic right now. Check your AI connection and try again.
copilot.disabledHint: Enable the Global AI Copilot in Settings → Experimental.
copilot.emptyBody: Ask for help, or try a suggestion below. I know where you are in the app.
copilot.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
copilot.heuristicsOnlyNoFindings: No narrative issues detected right now. Your story structure looks good! Disable offline mode to ask AI-powered questions.
copilot.heuristicsOnlyReply: Here are the narrative insights I found without using AI:
copilot.insight.highRepetition.desc: "{{chapter}}" contains paragraphs with very similar wording.
copilot.insight.highRepetition.title: Repetitive phrasing
copilot.insight.missingWorld.desc: {{entry}} appears in your manuscript but its profile is only {{pct}}% complete.
copilot.insight.missingWorld.title: World entry underspecified
copilot.insight.openLoop.desc: {{pct}}% of your chapters are in Act II — consider adding a midpoint beat.
copilot.insight.openLoop.title: Act II may be overlong
copilot.insight.overlengthScene.desc: "{{title}}" is {{times}}x longer than your average chapter.
copilot.insight.overlengthScene.title: Unusually long chapter
copilot.insight.plotHole.desc: {{character}} is mentioned in "{{chapterA}}" before being introduced in "{{chapterB}}".
copilot.insight.plotHole.title: Possible continuity gap
copilot.insight.slowPacing.desc: {{count}} consecutive chapters are significantly shorter than your average.
copilot.insight.slowPacing.title: Slow pacing detected
copilot.insight.tensionDrop.desc: Chapters "{{from}}" through "{{to}}" show a tension drop without a recovery beat.
copilot.insight.tensionDrop.title: Tension drop detected
copilot.insight.underdevelopedChar.desc: {{name}} appears {{count}} times but has no arc or motivation filled in.
copilot.insight.underdevelopedChar.title: Character needs development
copilot.placeholder: Ask me anything about your story…
copilot.runningDiagnostic: Running a ProForge diagnostic on your manuscript…
copilot.subtitle: Your writing assistant
copilot.suggestionCharacterArc: How can I develop my characters further?
copilot.suggestionDiagnostic: Run a quick diagnostic on my manuscript
copilot.suggestionExplainView: What can I do on this screen?
copilot.suggestionImprove: How can I improve my opening?
copilot.suggestionImproveOpening: How can I strengthen my opening chapter?
copilot.suggestionTensionGap: Explain the tension gap in my story
copilot.suggestionTopInsight: What's the most urgent thing to fix?
copilot.suggestionWorldBuilding: What world-building details am I missing?
copilot.title: AI Copilot
